title: Karate Club Community Intelligence
summary: Build a community intelligence surface for graph embeddings, role discovery, and network-segmentation insights across fraud and social data.
knowledge_base: Karate Club Community Intelligence is positioned as a Graph Community Analytics starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Build a community intelligence surface for graph embeddings, role discovery, and network-segmentation insights across fraud and social data.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on karateclub, graph, embeddings, analytics.
Source paper: Karate Club: An API Oriented Open-source Python Framework for Unsupervised Learning on Graphs

Production differentiation focus: Translate upstream graph community analytics logic into stakeholder-ready dashboards, memos, and scenario controls.; Add reproducible docs, deployment-ready structure, and polished collateral for GitHub and LinkedIn.; Make the core decisions easier to interpret for product, finance, and operations partners.
paper_title: Karate Club: An API Oriented Open-source Python Framework for Unsupervised Learning on Graphs
why_high_score: Official or primary upstream repo with 2275 GitHub stars.
